name: ClientSpace
description: Dual-role client portal: admins manage clients, projects, tasks, and file sharing; clients get a focused view of their work. React, Node.js, and Supabase with row-level security.
thumbnailAlt: ClientSpace login screen for the admin and client portal

name: Auction.io
description: Fantasy sports auction admin: teams, player pools, bidding flow, and dashboards. Angular with Supabase auth and PostgreSQL.
thumbnailAlt: Auction.io admin dashboard showing team and player management

name: The Bridge CRM
description: Enterprise CRM built from scratch into the operational platform for The Bridge community — managing operations, events, registrations, and administration. Angular SSR frontend with a Node and Express API layer.

name: HR AI Recruitment Platform
description: AI-powered recruitment automation: candidate ranking, matching, and sourcing workflows built with the OpenAI API, browser automation, scraping, and backend APIs.

name: MotoExpert
description: Automotive product spanning web, backend, and mobile. Modernized the stack across React Native, Angular, Express, and Prisma.

name: AgentMesh
description: AI-driven profile matching platform with authentication, backend APIs, and intelligent recommendations powered by the OpenAI API.
